evaluation.note: Synthetic benchmark — tuned at 0.80 threshold after surge-adjusted retrain. See twin_validation for realistic numbers.

twin_validation.note: Porter Digital Twin — 1,296,000 trips, 30 days, 17 cities. Surge-adjusted features + retrain.
twin_validation.key_fix: fare_to_expected_ratio surge-adjusted + hard negatives retrain. Surge FPR dropped from 50.6% (pre-fix) to 0.6%.
twin_validation.meeting_verdict: STRONG — Model performs well on Porter-scale twin data. FPR and precision both acceptable. Ready for shadow pilot conversation.
